name: local-websites
description: Waypoint Local — automated website prospecting and build pipeline

scripts.discover:tier1: npm run discover:home-services && npm run discover:trades && npm run discover:guides && npm run discover:professional && npm run discover:landscaping && npm run discover:wellness
scripts.discover:home-services: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category home-services --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:trades: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category trades-construction --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:guides: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category outdoor-guides --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:professional: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category professional-services --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:landscaping: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category landscaping --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:wellness: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category wellness --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:auto: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category auto-services --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:specialty: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category specialty-trades --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:restaurant: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category restaurant --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:lodging: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category lodging --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:retail: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category retail-boutique --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.discover:outdoor: node --import=./tools/_load-env.js tools/discover-leads.js --category outdoor-adventure --radius 50000 && npm run export
scripts.sweep: npm run discover && npm run audit && npm run score && npm run export
